treatments: Spray Carbendazim 1 g/L or Mancozeb 2 g/L.
Improve field drainage to avoid standing water.
preventive: Remove weeds and maintain field hygiene.
Maintain field sanitation and remove debris.

treatments: Spray Chlorpyrifos 2.5 ml/L or Triazophos 2 ml/L.
Hand-pick adult beetles in early morning and destroy them.
preventive: Drain water temporarily to reduce pest activity.

treatments: Spray Imidacloprid 0.3 ml/L or Thiamethoxam 0.2 g/L to control leafhoppers.
Remove and destroy infected plants immediately.
preventive: Synchronize planting with neighbours to reduce vector build-up.
Avoid standing water and maintain proper drainage.
fertilizer: Increase Potash to boost plant resistance.
